{"code":"import pandas as pd
import json

def calculate_average_intraday_volatility(data):
    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
    df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors=\'coerce\')
    df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])
    df = df[df["Date"].dt.year >= 2020]
    df["Volatility"] = (df["High"].astype(float) - df["Low"].astype(float)) / df["Open"].astype(float)
    average_volatility = df.groupby("Index")["Volatility"].mean()
    return average_volatility

var_tool_query_db_i1eCfqy4M8j0z7JbINv1 = json.loads(var_tool_query_db_i1eCfqy4M8j0z7JbINv1)

average_volatility = calculate_average_intraday_volatility(var_tool_query_db_i1eCfqy4M8j0z7JbINv1)

most_volatile_index = average_volatility.idxmax()

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(most_volatile_index))
"}

args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

def calculate_average_intraday_volatility(data):
    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
    df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors=\"coerce\")
    df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])
    df = df[df["Date"].dt.year >= 2020]
    df["Volatility"] = (df["High"].astype(float) - df["Low"].astype(float)) / df["Open"].astype(float)
    average_volatility = df.groupby("Index")["Volatility"].mean()
    return average_volatility


var_tool_query_db_siws1c7HSWDt5NRMSwHX = dab_load_rows(var_tool_query_db_siws1c7HSWDt5NRMSwHX)

average_volatility = calculate_average_intraday_volatility(var_tool_query_db_siws1c7HSWDt5NRMSwHX)

if not average_volatility.empty:
    most_volatile_index = average_volatility.idxmax()
else:
    most_volatile_index = None

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(most_volatile_index))
